prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年宁夏大学在青海省理科/物理类最低位次分别为 13666→10495→12853→9670→10173，整体波动较大，近 3 年在 9670–12853 之间震荡；2025 年基准约 10173 名；2021–2026 年该校在青海省理科/物理类招生计划均为 6 人，六年来计划完全持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 宁夏大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从 2021 年第 170 名持续上升至 2026 年第 137 名，学校综合实力和认可度稳步提升，对考生吸引力有所增强；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，仅涉及图书馆管理类事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第 104 位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；宁夏大学在第五轮学科评估中无 A- 及以上学科，优势学科主要集中在草学、民族学、化学工程与技术等 B+ 及以下层次，整体学科竞争力在 211 高校中偏弱，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在青海省理科/物理类招生专业为生物技术、动物科学、植物保护/智慧农业等农林生物类专业，社会整体热度 一般；青海省 2026 年物理类考生约 30672 人（按历史比例估算），较 2025 年 30457 人小幅增加约 0.7%，竞争略有加剧2025 年物理类本科批 350 分，近年呈小幅上升趋势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 10173、招生计划持平、考生总数小幅增加及学校排名持续上升等因素，预计 2026 年竞争略有加剧，位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约 10203 名，区间 9703–10703 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 生物技术（无色盲、色弱）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 动物科学（农林类专业）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

- 植物保护（农林类专业）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 9703–10703 名内，建议以二档动物科学为主力填报，一档生物技术可冲刺，三档智慧农业/植物保护作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（9703 名以内）可重点冲刺生物技术专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings of Ningxia University in Qinghai Province for Science/Physics Category were 13666→10495→12853→9670→10173, showing significant fluctuations overall, oscillating between 9670 and 12853 in the past 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 10173; from 2021 to 2026, the enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Qinghai Province remained at 6 students, with no changes in expansion or reduction over six years, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has steadily risen from 170th in 2021 to 137th in 2026, indicating a continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition, enhancing its appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, involving only library management incidents, with no major negative public opinion; its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 104th, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms and no clear signs of increased application interest; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ningxia University has no A- or above disciplines, with its advantageous disciplines mainly at B+ and below levels such as Grass Science, Ethnology, and Chemical Engineering and Technology, showing relatively weak overall disciplinary competitiveness among 211 universities, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The majors offered by the university in Qinghai Province for Science/Physics Category include Biotechnology, Animal Science, Plant Protection/Smart Agriculture, and other agriculture, forestry, and biology-related majors, with generally average social popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is approximately 30,672 (estimated based on historical proportions), a slight increase of about 0.7% from 30,457 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; the undergraduate batch cutoff for Physics Category in 2025 was 350 points, showing a slight upward trend in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10173, unchanged enrollment plan, a slight increase in total candidates, and the university's continuously rising ranking, it is expected that competition will slightly intensify in 2026, with the ranking shifting slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10203, with a range of 9703–10703.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Biotechnology (No color blindness or color weakness)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Animal Science (Agriculture and forestry major)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Smart Agriculture (Agriculture and forestry major)
- Plant Protection (Agriculture and forestry major)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9703–10703, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 Animal Science as the main choice, with Tier 1 Biotechnology as a reach option, and Tier 3 Smart Agriculture/Plant Protection as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 9703), you can focus on reaching for the Biotechnology major.
